Add any GoogleSiteKit to the backend of the website to  seo@sitesbysara.com
Ensure Credentials are in Sheet & shared with Ops (in Clickup task comments)
Ensure Meta tags & page titles correct
Make sure default theme or install images, posts, pages, etc. to be removed
Remove any images NOT in use; remove Dummy Pages/Content; remove deactivated plugins
If using any paid plugins, provide the plugin details.
Optional: Use a content delivery network (CDN or HIPPA)
Test sharing the link on Facebook/LinkedIn to ensure Preview icon is Logo
Captcha on the website >> Google website V2 or V3
If WP or any plugins are outdated, bring them current.
Ensure Blog Comments are off, no Hello-World
Update ALL forms to go to the Client & dev@sitesbysara.com
Add to the footer: Copyright © 2025 {Company Name}. A Sites by Sara Website. - (hyper link SBS website)
Ensure site is fully Mobile Responsive
ON Cloudways: Ensure Server Caching Disabled
Turn site ON to search engines
Create and send SBS the final training Video
Remove Extra Pages, Posts, or Images (theme or WP dummy content)
Test ALL forms to go to the developer; present nicely, saved to database.
